prompt: Run Stage 3 task synthesis on dashboard performance optimization task. Stage 2 deep analysis is complete. Synthesize and prepare agreement package.

assertions.text: analysis.md created with all required template sections
Synthesis preserves the retention cohort query bug finding from system analysis
Synthesis identifies the 3-layer bottleneck: backend (sequential queries), cache (unused), frontend (no downsampling, monolithic query)
Constraints include: GraphQL API backward compatibility, 2-second target, zero test coverage
Candidate solution directions address: backend-first (parallelization) vs. full-stack optimization
Risks include thundering herd and connection pool concerns from parallelization
The cache-busting time range bug (Overview.tsx:26-27) is captured in the synthesis
